authorized: migrations on disposable or local data
review and release actions needed to finish this repository
excluded: deployment to an unnamed external production host

requirements.statement: Production Option 2 is one deployable application container containing web, API, PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO/object storage, Node worker, and Python worker processes.
requirements.evidence: production Compose config, image digest, service-count contract output

requirements.statement: PID 1 is a fixed supervisor with declared process executables, users, readiness checks, restart behavior, and logs.
requirements.evidence: supervisor manifest, process health output, restart/failure-injection log

requirements.statement: PostgreSQL, Redis, object storage, and evidence data persist in dedicated subdirectories of one named volume rooted at /var/lib/shore-sentinel, with backup and restore procedures.
requirements.source: architecture_spec:4; plan:Migration and data-safety contract; plan:Task 3
requirements.evidence: volume inventory, pg_dump/Redis/MinIO backup records, restore rehearsal

requirements.statement: Processes have logical least-privilege boundaries through users, ownership, environment allowlists, loopback bindings, capability restrictions, and read-only paths.
requirements.evidence: non-root/process-user inventory, environment diff, capability and mount inspection

requirements.statement: Option 1 remains a local one-time audit with local evidence and no implicit enrollment or upload.
requirements.evidence: reviewed local-audit command and redacted local output

requirements.statement: Option 2 builds and runs the single-container application with one persistent application-data volume and documented health checks.
requirements.evidence: staging install log, health output, stop-without-volume-deletion record

requirements.statement: Authenticated navigation uses the approved ordered groups Dashboard, AI Assets, Audit Reports, Knowledgebase, System, Users.
requirements.evidence: navigation contract test output and three-viewport browser captures

requirements.statement: Versioned SQL migrations run once under an advisory lock before application processes; API startup does not mutate schema or recompute seed hashes.
requirements.evidence: ordered migration log, advisory-lock contention output, startup DDL-negative test

requirements.statement: Migration upgrade, fresh install, interruption, restart, and rollback compatibility are tested against existing data contracts.
requirements.source: architecture_spec:7; plan:Task 4; plan:Migration and data-safety contract
requirements.evidence: fresh/upgrade/interruption/restart/rollback migration records

requirements.statement: Production secrets are required and are not exposed to browser clients, queue payloads, logs, or unauthorized processes.
requirements.evidence: redacted secret scan, environment allowlist, payload inspection

requirements.statement: Node and Python workers use separate authenticated workload paths, and Python cannot reach managed-target egress.
requirements.evidence: positive/negative worker identity and parser egress test output

requirements.statement: Independent host/network default-deny egress or authenticated gateway enforcement remains required; application validation is not firewall proof.
requirements.evidence: check-only policy result plus approved external positive/negative fixture evidence

requirements.statement: Disposable AI test bundles use bounded unprivileged OS process/user/namespace sandboxes inside the one application container; no second runner host/container or Docker socket is part of the release baseline.
requirements.evidence: sandbox policy/process inspection, positive and negative sandbox matrix, no-socket mount inspection

requirements.statement: Existing SSH host-key, root/path/CIDR, ForceCommand, bounded cancellation, and one-time grant controls remain mandatory.
requirements.evidence: approved disposable fixture protocol output and negative SSH matrix

requirements.statement: Artifacts and audit events carry hashes, provenance, policy/bundle/image identity, parser version, retention, and append-only linkage.
requirements.evidence: provenance manifest, hash-chain verification, retention/legal-hold output

requirements.statement: Health reflects all required process/dependency readiness and reports degraded state instead of unconditional green.
requirements.evidence: healthy and dependency-failure health outputs with timestamps

requirements.statement: Updates validate source/config, backup persistent state, migrate once, record identity, and support rollback.
requirements.source: architecture_spec:7; architecture_spec:11; plan:Task 7; plan:Migration and data-safety contract
requirements.evidence: staged update and rollback rehearsal, backup IDs, prior-image health check

requirements.statement: The image uses pinned runtime/package inputs, the root lockfile, SBOM generation, and retained image digest.
requirements.evidence: Dockerfile contract, SBOM, dependency audit, image digest

requirements.statement: Navigation remains accessible and responsive with the approved labels and required interaction states.
requirements.evidence: browser viewport captures, accessibility report, console/page/overflow record

requirements.statement: The release has executable unit, contract, structural, Compose, migration, security-negative, browser, backup/restore, and rollback coverage.
requirements.evidence: CI run URL/ID, command logs, browser evidence, restore/rollback records

requirements.statement: Supervisor, API, worker, migration, and storage events are structured, redacted, timestamped, and reviewable.
requirements.evidence: redacted structured log bundle and observability review

requirements.statement: No unmet control is silently waived; any exception records scope, expiry, compensating control, and approver.
requirements.evidence: complete evidence index and signed waiver records, or explicit no-waiver result

requirements.statement: Candidate-specific evidence scores at least 95/100 and meets every category threshold and mandatory release gate.
requirements.evidence: reviewed scorecard with category points, threshold result, candidate commit, and image digest

requirements.statement: Prior delivery/configuration and persistent-data backups remain usable until staged rollback passes.
requirements.source: architecture_spec:11; plan:Migration and data-safety contract; plan:Rollback and review boundary
requirements.evidence: prior image/config identity, volume backup references, staged rollback health and critical-flow result
